# Orange Accessibility Guidelines

> Guidelines, methods, resources and tools proposed by the Orange Digital 
> Accessibility Expertise Center.
> We offer training, publish resources for digital stakeholders, support 
> projects and perform compliance audits.
> Our expertise covers websites (e-commerce, e-learning, business 
> applications, Intranet, etc.), mobile applications, office documents, 
> corporate social networks, emails, videos, software packages, etc.
> This site is available in English (https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/en/) 
> and in French (https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/fr/).


## About
- [Home](https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/en/): Orange Digital Accessibility Expertise Center homepage

## Web
- [Web accessibility guidelines](https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/en/web/): All web accessibility recommendations
- [Web guidelines for designers](https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/en/web/design/): Web accessibility recommendations for designers
- [Web guidelines for developers](https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/en/web/develop/): Web accessibility recommendations for developers
- [Web essential checklist](https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/en/web/essentials-checklist/): The must-have criteria for web accessibility

## Android
- [Android accessibility guidelines](https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/en/mobile/android/): All Android accessibility recommendations
- [Android guidelines for designers](https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/en/mobile/android/design/): Android accessibility recommendations for designers
- [Android guidelines for developers](https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/en/mobile/android/development/): Android accessibility recommendations for developers
- [Android essential checklist](https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/en/mobile/android/essentials-checklist/): The must-have criteria for Android accessibility

## iOS
- [iOS accessibility guidelines](https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/en/mobile/ios/): All iOS accessibility recommendations
- [iOS guidelines for designers](https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/en/mobile/ios/design/): iOS accessibility recommendations for designers
- [iOS guidelines for developers](https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/en/mobile/ios/development/): iOS accessibility recommendations for developers
- [iOS essential checklist](https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/en/mobile/ios/essentials-checklist/): The must-have criteria for iOS accessibility

## Content and communication
- [Content and communication guidelines](https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/en/content-and-communication/): All content and communication accessibility recommendations
- [Word accessibility guidelines](https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/en/content-and-communication/word/): Accessibility recommendations for Word documents
- [PowerPoint accessibility guidelines](https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/en/content-and-communication/powerpoint/): Accessibility recommendations for PowerPoint presentations
- [PDF accessibility guidelines](https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/en/content-and-communication/pdf/): Accessibility recommendations for PDF documents
- [Content and communication essential checklist](https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/en/content-and-communication/essentials-checklist/): The must-have criteria for content and communication accessibility

## Legal framework
- [Legal framework](https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/en/planning/): Articles about the legal framework around digital accessibility

## Articles
- [Articles](https://a11y-guidelines.orange.com/en/articles/): Regularly published articles on digital accessibility topics
